autoslides.blurb: The full Yanhekt client. Watch live and recorded lectures, download recordings, and extract slides while the video plays — there is no separate download step. Adds AI filtering, slide review, and PDF or PPTX export.

apps.disclaimer: AutoSlides is a third-party tool for personal study. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to Beijing Institute of Technology.
apps.errorBody: GitHub and the mirror both failed to answer.

extractor.blurb: A native tool for video you already have — screen recordings, conference talks, any MP4. Hardware decoding processes a lecture in as little as 10 seconds, then filters, crops, reviews, and exports to PDF.

apps.forkLead: It depends on where the video comes from.
apps.heroLead: Two desktop apps that watch a lecture for the moment the slide actually changes, and keep only those frames. Everything runs on your own machine.
apps.mirrorHint: GitHub slow or unreachable? Mirror routes the same file through gh-proxy.org.
apps.ribbonCaption: Only the frames where the slide changes are kept.

courses.signInToLoad: Sign in to load your course list

feedback.lead: Found a bug, or want to suggest something? Pick whichever suits you.
feedback.openIssueDesc: Report it on GitHub, where anyone can follow along.
feedback.sendEmailDesc: Write to the team privately. Opens your mail app with the details filled in.
feedback.title: Feedback

home.signInHint: Sign in to see your live streams and recordings

legal.bilingualNote: This document is published in English and 繁體中文. The English version prevails.
legal.indexLead: A short guide to each section. It is not a substitute for reading the document in full.
legal.notice: A third-party tool for personal study. Not affiliated with or endorsed by BIT.

notice.affiliation: AutoSlides is an independent third-party tool for personal study. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to Beijing Institute of Technology.
notice.agree: By continuing, you agree to the Terms and acknowledge the Privacy Policy.
notice.cookies: AutoSlides sets no cookies of its own, and has no ads, analytics, or tracking. Cloudflare, which protects this site, may set a strictly necessary cookie to tell real visitors from bots.

items.settings: Remember your settings, such as theme, language, and subscribed courses
items.signedIn: Keep you signed in to Yanhekt — your sign-in token stays in this browser
items.slides: Save the slides you extract, in this browser only — they are never uploaded

notice.lead: AutoSlides stores data in your browser to:
notice.title: Before you continue to AutoSlides

playback.browserNotSupported: Your browser does not support the video tag.
playback.captureNotSupported: Slide capture is not supported in this browser for this stream.
playback.confirmLeaveExtraction: Slide extraction is running. Leave and stop extraction?
playback.selectOneStreamToCopy: Select one stream to copy its URL
playback.sessionNotFound: Session not found in this course
playback.signInToWatch: Sign in to watch this lecture
playback.streamNotFound: Live stream not found — it may have ended

warming.hint: The initial playback of a recording is routed through our relay service and may require a brief warm-up period.
warming.title: Preparing playback…

sessions.noSessions: No sessions found for this course.

trash.confirmClear: Move all trashed items to system trash?
trash.confirmClearFolder: Move all removed images in {folder} to system trash?
trash.confirmDeleteFolder: Delete {folder} and all of its images? This cannot be undone.
trash.emptyFiltered: No Images Match the Current Filters

webAuth.passwordDisclaimer: Your credentials are only used to sign in to school SSO and are never stored.
webAuth.passwordOptionDesc: Sign in with your school SSO account
webAuth.tokenHint: Drag the button above to your bookmarks bar, then click it on yanhekt.cn to fetch your token.
